system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_material_getbyorder","body":"
CREATE   PROC TR_MATERIAL_GETBYORDER
(
	@KHO NVARCHAR(50),
	@DONHANG NVARCHAR(MAX)
)
AS
BEGIN
	--SET @KHO = 'SON';
	--SET @DONHANG = 'VF-0004-4, VF-0005-1, VF-0005-3';

	SELECT b.item_number, SUM(b.order_qty) AS order_qty
	INTO #THONGTIN_DONHANG
	FROM tr_order A
		INNER JOIN tr_order_detail B ON A.order_number = B.order_number
	WHERE A.order_number IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@DONHANG, ','))
	GROUP BY b.item_number

	IF @KHO = 'NKI'
	BEGIN
		SELECT DISTINCT C.id, C.idxuong, C.mavt, C.mota, C.tenvt, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt, C.dacdiem
		FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim A
			INNER JOIN #THONGTIN_DONHANG B ON A.masp = B.item_number
			INNER JOIN tr_material C ON A.mavt = C.mavt
	END
	ELSE IF @KHO = 'DGO'
	BEGIN
		SELECT DISTINCT C.id, C.idxuong, C.mavt, C.mota, C.tenvt, C.quycach, C.mausac, C.dvt, C.dacdiem
		FROM tr_dinhmuc_donggoi A
			INNER JOIN #THONGTIN_DONHANG B ON A.masp = B.item_number
			INNER JOIN tr_material C ON A.madonggoi = C.mavt
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		DECLARE @tenkho nvarchar(50)
		SELECT @tenkho = [description] FROM tr_site WHERE [name] = @KHO

		SELECT A.*, B.soluong 
		FROM tr_material A WITH(NOLOCK)
			LEFT JOIN tr_tonkho_sum B ON A.mavt = B.mavt
		WHERE ISNULL(xoa, 'N') = 'N'
			AND (kho = @tenkho OR kho = N'VẬT TƯ KHÁC') 
			AND ISNULL(xacnhan,0) <> 0
			AND COALESCE(ngayhethan, '9999/12/31') > GETDATE()

	END

	DROP TABLE #THONGTIN_DONHANG;

END




","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_site","dbo.tr_tonkho_sum"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
